next_steps: Schedule follow-up meeting to review POC progress

Explore self-serve capability for cancellation requests
Review email notification flow for schedule changes
extracted_fields.call_summary: The call was informative and provided a clear overview of the voluntary cancellation flow for airline bookings. However, there were some areas where the conversation could have been more engaging and interactive.
call_highlights: Clear explanation of the voluntary cancellation flow
Use of visual aids to illustrate the process
Engagement with questions from the client
call_concerns: Insufficient exploration of budget and timeline
Lack of clear next steps and follow-up plan
extracted_fields.individual_summary: The individual demonstrated a good understanding of the airline booking process and provided clear explanations of the voluntary cancellation flow.
individual_strengths: Ability to engage with questions from the client
Good knowledge of the airline booking process
individual_improvements: More interactive and engaging conversation style
Better exploration of technical requirements and budget
Clearer next steps and follow-up plan
call_insights: The client is interested in exploring self-serve capability for cancellation requests
The airline booking process is complex and requires careful consideration of multiple factors
The client is looking for a clear and concise explanation of the voluntary cancellation flow
extracted_fields.conclusions: The call was informative and provided a clear overview of the voluntary cancellation flow for airline bookings. However, there were some areas where the conversation could have been more engaging and interactive.
